ad;-ljpeg;-ldeflate;-lgio-2.0;-lgmodule-2.0;-pthread;-lz;-lmount;-lblkid;-lselinux;-lsepol;-lgobject-2.0;-lffi;-lglib-2.0;-lm;-pthread;-lpcre2-8
